subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 667074291/220220767 is not a GRB
body:
O.J. Roberts (USRA/NASA-MSFC) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

���The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 667074291/220220767 at 18:24:46.76 UT on 
20 February 2022, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. 
This trigger is due to local particle activity."
